name: Wcm Global Growth Limited
analysis: WQG's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 9% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.9050, stop A$1.7622, target A$2.3334 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
